field.name: person_id
field.label: COM_CLUBORGANISATION_FIELD_PERSON_LABEL
field.query: SELECT id AS value, CONCAT(lastname, ', ', firstname) AS text FROM #__cluborganisation_persons WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY lastname, firstname

field.name: type_id
field.label: COM_CLUBORGANISATION_FIELD_MEMBERSHIP_TYPE_LABEL
field.query: SELECT id AS value, title AS text FROM #__cluborganisation_membership_types WHERE published = 1 ORDER BY ordering, title
